message:
feat(bundler): make skill installation atomic

Use temp directory + atomic rename pattern to ensure partial installs
don't leave corrupted state:

1. Create temp directory as sibling to target (same filesystem)
2. Unpack blob contents to temp
3. Atomic rename to final target path
4. Clean up temp on any failure

This prevents partial installs from being visible and simplifies
rollback logic - if install fails, the target was never created.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
